notes: Firefox 134 Linux. Key differences from Chrome: NO sec-ch-ua headers (Firefox doesn't implement Client Hints); User-Agent comes before Accept (different ordering); Accept includes image/avif,image/webp but NOT signed-exchange; Accept-Language value uses comma-separated with semicolon weights. Sec-Fetch-* present but no Client Hints = strong Firefox signal.
